proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Nat) { x0.pow(x1) = pow_real_fn(x1, x0) }(x, Nat.0)
function[T0: lib(monoid).Monoid](x0: T0) { x0.pow(Nat.0) = T0.1 }[Real](x)
function[T0, T1](x0: T1, x1: T0) { constant[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0 }[Real, Real](Real.1, x)
function(x0: Real, x1: Nat) { x0.pow(x1) = pow_real_fn(x1, x0) }(x, n.suc)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0) { lib(functions).compose[T0, T0, T1](x0, identity_fn[T0], x1) = x0(x1) }[Real, Real -> Real](Real.mul, x)
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[Real, Real, Real -> Real](Real.mul, identity_fn[Real], x)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(identity_fn(x), Real.1)
function[T0: lib(monoid).Monoid](x0: T0) { x0 * T0.1 = x0 }[Real](x)
function(x0: Real) { Real.1 * x0 = x0 }(identity_fn(x))
function(x0: Real, x1: Nat) { x0.pow(x1) = pow_real_fn(x1, x0) }(x, n)

goal: pointwise_mul(identity_fn[Real], pow_real_fn(n), x) = identity_fn(x) * pow_real_fn(n, x)
proof: function[T0: lib(mul).Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[Real, Real](identity_fn[Real], x, pow_real_fn(n))
function(x0: Nat) { continuous(pow_real_fn(x0)) = p(x0) }(Nat.0)
function(x0: Nat) { continuous(pow_real_fn(x0)) = p(x0) }(x)
function(x0: Nat) { continuous(pow_real_fn(x0)) = p(x0) }(x.suc)

goal: p(Nat.0) and forall(x0: Nat) { p(x0) implies p(x0.suc) }
proof: let w0: Nat satisfy { p(w0) and not p(w0.suc) }
function(x0: Nat) { not p(x0) or p(x0.suc) }(w0)
p(w0)
not p(w0.suc)
p(w0.suc)
function[T0](x0: T0) { identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[Nat](x)
not forall(x0: Nat) { not p(x0) or p(x0.suc) } or forall(x1: Nat) { p(x1) } = true
not p(identity_fn(x))
(forall(x2: Nat) { not p(x2) or p(x2.suc) } = true)
function(x0: Nat) { p(x0) }(identity_fn(x))
function(x0: Nat) { p(x0) }(n)
function(x0: Nat) { continuous(pow_real_fn(x0)) = p(x0) }(n)
